hero.eyebrow: Japanese Cuisine · Sake Bar · San Pedro, Monterrey
hero.subtitle: い わ — the rock
hero.desc: An intimate Japanese dining experience in the heart of San Pedro. Signature rolls, premium nigiri, and curricanes you won't forget.

philosophy.p1: Since 2020, Sushi IWA has been Monterrey's best-kept secret. Hidden on the second floor of Sienna Tower, our bar offers a unique experience where the chef works right in front of you.
philosophy.p2: First-quality fish, warm rice, and authentic Japanese technique fused with the local palate. This isn't franchise sushi — this is IWA.

reservation.desc: The space is intimate — only 12 bar seats. Reserve in advance to guarantee your spot.
reservation.name: Name

ig.title: Follow us · @sushi.iwa
ig.sub: Daily photos, behind the scenes, and more

footer.tagline: Author Japanese cuisine in the heart of San Pedro Garza García, Monterrey. いわ.

menuPage.notice: "Consuming raw or undercooked seafood may increase the risk of foodborne illness or cause severe allergic reactions in some individuals."
